reason: Independent exact-head review found seven blockers and one retry warning; a test-first correction cycle is active.

orchestrationDecisions.reason: This is the assigned isolated issue worker; planning artifacts and threat/TDD matrix are the current critical path.
The worker authored and ran fake-transport and durable-state contract tests before either production module existed.
Implemented the two-file typed aggregate/adapter slice and completed focused GREEN plus adversarial refactor locally.
Focused tests, full Shepherd tests, strict Pi 0.80.6 TypeScript, offline Pi RPC discovery, and diff check passed; parent superseded and cancelled make verify.
Updated terminal phase evidence and prepared the ready stacked PR handoff.
The exact-head correction owns both affected modules, so another mutating worker would collide; planned all review findings as RED regression slices before production edits.
